name: jave-language
description: Syntax highlighting for Jave programming language

jave.languageServer.useBundled.description: Prefer bundled javels binary from the extension package when available.

jave.languageServer.command.description: Fallback command used to launch javels when bundled binaries are disabled or unavailable.

jave.languageServer.args.description: Fallback arguments passed to the language server command.

jave.languageServer.cwd.description: Working directory for the language server process. Empty uses the first workspace folder.
